prompt: A powerful conceptual illustration showing the impact of rising global temperatures. A human figure stands in the center, half of the body healthy and natural, the other half cracked, dry, and burning due to extreme heat. The background transitions from a lush green forest to a barren desert with intense sunlight. No charts, no graphs, no text, no labels. Emotional, symbolic, cinematic composition.
insight: Rising global temperatures are severely damaging the environment and human life
